content: The hard capacity limit of agent working memory for reasoning can be reframed as a beneficial selection constraint for curiosity-driven active learning agent memory systems, where only high-prediction-error surprising experiences get retained to push the frontier of SOTA 2024-2025 active learning agent designs. This naturally prunes low-information redundant memories that would otherwise bloat working memory and degrade multi-step reasoning.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
